add_money.process: Two-step OTP-based process: Initiate → receive OTP on email → Confirm
add_money.otp_session_ttl: Session expires in 5 minutes if not confirmed

payment_methods.note: ADX Bank does not integrate with external payment gateways. All transactions are simulated internally for demo purposes.

refund_policy.failed_add_money: If OTP verification fails or session expires, no money is debited. Re-initiate the transaction.
refund_policy.dispute: Disputes on add-money transactions must be raised within 7 days

restrictions.inactive_account: Add-money is not allowed for inactive or blocked accounts
restrictions.kyc_pending: Customers with pending KYC can add up to ₹10,000 per month
